items.definition_en: Salt is a white mineral used to add flavor to food.
items.example_en: I like to put a little salt on my fries.

items.definition_en: Pepper is a spice that makes food taste a bit hot.
items.example_en: He adds pepper to his eggs every morning.

items.definition_en: Anise is a spice with a sweet, licorice flavor.
items.example_en: She uses anise when making spiced tea in winter.

items.definition_en: Cinnamon is a brown spice that is often used in sweet foods.
items.example_en: My mom uses cinnamon in her apple pie.

items.definition_en: Ginger is a spicy root often used in cooking and tea.
items.example_en: We put ginger in the soup for extra flavor.

items.definition_en: Garlic is a small white plant used to flavor food.
items.example_en: She likes garlic on her pizza.

items.definition_en: Basil is a green herb often used in Italian food.
items.example_en: I grow fresh basil in my kitchen.

items.definition_en: Nutmeg is a brown spice used in sweet and savory foods.
items.example_en: Add a little nutmeg to the cake batter.

items.definition_en: A clove is a small dried flower bud used to add flavor.
items.example_en: She puts a clove in the hot drink.

items.definition_en: Rosemary is a green herb with a strong taste.
items.example_en: I like rosemary on my roasted potatoes.

items.definition_en: Thyme is a small green herb used in cooking.
items.example_en: Thyme adds a nice flavor to soup.

items.definition_en: Parsley is a green herb used to decorate and season food.
items.example_en: Parsley makes the salad look fresh.

items.definition_en: A bay leaf is a green leaf used to flavor soups and stews.
items.example_en: Remove the bay leaf before serving the soup.

items.definition_en: Dill is a green herb that is often used with fish.
items.example_en: She likes dill in her potato salad.

items.definition_en: Coriander is a green herb with a fresh flavor.
items.example_en: Coriander is popular in Asian dishes.

items.definition_en: Turmeric is a yellow spice used in many dishes.
items.example_en: Turmeric gives the sauce a golden color.
